vol_name: Musical groove shapes children's free dancing
vol_description: Videos associated with "Musical groove shapes children's free dancing", forthcoming in "Developmental Science". The videos are of children (3.0-6.9 years) dancing in response to high- and low-groove musical excerpts (1 min each) at either ~120 bpm or ~170bpm. Numeric data and code associated with this experiment can be found at https://osf.io/j8tkr/, and the accepted manuscript can be found at [insert URL when ready].

vol_name: Tiny dancers: Effects of musical familiarity and tempo on children’s free dancing
vol_description:
Video Data used in the following paper: 
Kragness, K., Ullah, F., Chan, E., Moses, R. & Cirelli, L. K. (in press). Tiny dancers: Effects of musical familiarity and tempo on children’s free dancing. Developmental Psychology.
